title: cyclosorus oxyourus
intro: Cyclosorus oxyourus, also known as the Oxyura fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as skin irritations and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus oxyourus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus oxyourus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
